contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 15
- Description: Expanded warmup reply backfill — all 103 shops scanned
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/95
  
  Details:
  ## What
  Wrote and ran an expanded backfill script that scans ALL shops with warm-up emails sent (not just those with current 'AI: Prospect replied' status), finds prospect replies in Gmail, and records both the sent email + reply in DApp Remarks.
  
  ## Changes
  - New script: backfill_all_warmup_replies.py — checks every shop with a logged warm-up send, searches Gmail for replies, skips shops already backfilled, appends DApp Remarks with both sent and reply content
  - Ran live: 103 shops checked, 5 already had DApp Remarks, 4 new replies captured (Seagrape, Devine, Bucks, The Way Home Shop)
  - Previous backfill script (backfill_warmup_reply_remarks.py) only caught shops still at 'AI: Prospect replied' status; the expanded script catches shops whose status progressed to Partnered/etc.
  
  ## GitHub
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/95 (contains the warmup reply logic from earlier in session)
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 25.00
